mapper.insert: insert into crossrank (roleId,roleName,serverId,career,stateVip,level,fightPower,fashionBodyId,fashionWeaponId,wingModel,fashionHalo,fashionMatrix,spiritId) values (#{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serverId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{career, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stateVip, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{level, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fightPower, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fashionBodyId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fashionWeaponId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wingModel, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fashionHalo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fashionMatrix, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{spiritId, jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update: update crossrank set roleId= #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, roleName=#{roleName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, serverId=#{serverId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, career=#{career, jdbcType=INTEGER}, stateVip=#{stateVip, jdbcType=INTEGER}, level= #{level, jdbcType=INTEGER}, fightPower= #{fightPower, jdbcType=BIGINT}, fashionBodyId= #{fashionBodyId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, fashionWeaponId= #{fashionWeaponId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, wingModel= #{wingModel, jdbcType=INTEGER}, fashionHalo= #{fashionHalo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, fashionMatrix= #{fashionMatrix, jdbcType=INTEGER}, spiritId= #{spiritId, jdbcType=INTEGER} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from crossrank where id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
